name: Credit Innovation Group
description_short: Credit Innovation Group is a credit repair company offering personalized dispute services and credit coaching with a 6-month completion timeline and membership-based pricing model.
description_long:
Credit Innovation Group has been operating for 11 years and claims to have helped over 60,000 customers improve their credit profiles. The company positions itself as a credit repair specialist focused on disputing inaccuracies on credit reports and helping consumers become "loan ready" through a structured process. Their approach combines credit disputes with financial coaching and connections to vetted financial professionals.

The company offers a four-step credit repair process: initial credit report review through a secure portal, creation of a personalized plan by a Credit Specialist, direct dispute work with credit bureaus and creditors, and connection to financial experts upon profile improvement. They emphasize an AI-powered disputing method combined with personal coaching. Credit Innovation Group uses a membership model rather than per-dispute pricing, claiming this approach is more efficient and cost-effective than competitors who charge by individual dispute.

Credit Innovation Group distinguishes itself through several stated commitments: a focused 6-month timeline to completion, a membership-based pricing structure that avoids per-dispute accumulation, personalized credit coaching from specialists, and a 150-point, 90-day guarantee. The website emphasizes consistency and results over lengthy processes, positioning the membership model as superior to pay-per-dispute competitors. They also highlight AI-powered technology alongside human expertise.

Based on website claims alone, the company appears to operate as a standard credit repair service with membership pricing. However, consumers should note that credit repair results vary individually, and the 150-point, 90-day guarantee specifics are not detailed on the homepage. The company cites 2,000+ five-star reviews but does not provide independent verification links or third-party rating sources. As with all credit repair services, results depend heavily on the actual errors present on individual credit reports.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Membership-based pricing model avoids unlimited per-dispute fees that can accumulate over time
Structured 6-month timeline provides clear endpoint rather than indefinite service periods
Personalized credit coaching from specialists included as part of service
Direct team engagement with credit bureaus and creditors on behalf of customers
Secure online portal for document submission and credit report access
AI-powered disputing combined with human expert review
cons: Guarantee terms (150-point improvement) are vague and not fully explained on website
No pricing transparency provided; membership cost not disclosed upfront
Five-star review count (2,000+) lacks independent third-party verification sources
Credit repair results are highly individual and depend on actual reporting errors; not all disputes succeed
Requires customer to share credit reports and personal financial details with third party
best_for: Consumers with multiple credit report errors or inaccuracies who want professional dispute assistance
Credit-challenged borrowers seeking structured guidance toward loan readiness
People who prefer membership pricing over per-dispute models and want a defined timeline
Individuals willing to work with a credit specialist on financial habit building alongside disputes
diagnosis: Credit Innovation Group is best for credit-challenged consumers who want professional dispute assistance through a structured 6-month process with included coaching, rather than managing disputes alone or paying per dispute. The main caveat is that credit repair success depends entirely on whether actual errors exist on credit reports—disputes cannot remove accurate negative information—and the company's guarantees and review counts lack independent verification.
services: Personalized credit profile evaluation and consultation
Secure credit report access and review through online portal
Credit bureau disputes and inaccuracy challenges
Credit coaching and financial habit building
Connection to vetted financial professionals upon profile improvement
Credit score visualization and 3 C's of Credit breakdown
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
